entries.reason: Petrol and diesel excise and the fuel toll (petrol 892 = 379 excise + 513 toll; diesel 768) require the Roads and Fuel Tolls Act (Cap. 220) and its Finance Act amendments (FA2021 ss.42-43, FA2023 ss.50-51 per project_rulespec_tz), which are not among the 24 citation paths in the bound release tz-rulespec-2026-07-16. Alcohol and tobacco specific excise rates are encoded; petroleum-fuel excise is deferred pending a corpus ingest + re-cut carrying Cap. 220. Cigars appear only as an HS-tariff heading in FA2023 with no clean ad-valorem rate substring and are likewise deferred.
